description: PRODUCTION FLAGGING C1 - Flag model on Plan (combines gap FGAP-007 / C1). Net-new Flag model in plans/models/ FK to Plan (CASCADE): element_path (formset-row addressing, cf. collectDraftState/_formset.html), severity (must_fix|should_review|informational), message, verdict (from A1), is_resolved (default False), created_by_spec, created_at. Requires a DB migration. The production-side persistence the workshop draft flags channel (B1/TASK-014) maps onto when the orchestration trio (US-LLM-23/24/25, unbuilt) lands. Prerequisite for C2/C3. Part of the three-valued flagging model, production layer. Build via the canonical pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: A plan can carry any number of persisted flags, and they remain retrievable after a reload.
Each flag records the element it addresses, a message, the spec that produced it, its creation time, its verdict, and whether it is resolved (unresolved by default).
A flag's severity is exactly one of must-fix, should-review, or informational; any other value is rejected.
Deleting a plan deletes its flags; no flag outlives its plan.
The full project gate stays green.
